name: AWS WAF Web ACL
description: Schema representing an AWS WAF Web ACL (Access Control List) resource.

properties.name: Name
properties.description: The name of the web ACL.

properties.name: Id
properties.description: A unique identifier for the web ACL.

properties.name: ARN
properties.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the web ACL.

properties.name: Scope
properties.description: Specifies whether this is for CloudFront or for a regional application.

properties.name: DefaultAction
properties.description: The action to perform if none of the rules match.

properties.name: Rules
properties.description: The rules associated with the web ACL.

properties.name: VisibilityConfig
properties.description: Defines the CloudWatch metrics and sampling configuration.

properties.name: Capacity
properties.description: The web ACL capacity units (WCUs) consumed by this web ACL.

properties.name: Tags
properties.description: Tags associated with the web ACL.
